message:
🌱 Add argo-workflows: `BASE_HREF`  is not working mission (#913)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-workflows-3080-base-href-is-not-working",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-workflows: `BASE_HREF`  is not working",
+    "description": "`BASE_HREF`  is not working. This issue affects 53+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify argo-workflows troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your argo-workflows deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows -n argo-workflows --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-workflows configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows\n```\nCant Access argo UI if I change the `BASE_HREF` to something other than `/`\n\nI want it to be accessible at xxx.com/argo \n\nTo reproduce it you can just change the env variable `BASE_HREF` to something other than /."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for `BASE_HREF`  is not working",
+        "description": "Set the `BASE_HREF` environment variable on the argo-server deployment to serve the UI under a subpath. Also configure the Ingress to route the subpath to the argo-server service.\n```yaml\n- name: BASE_HREF\n  value: /argo/\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm `BASE_HREF`  is not working is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows -n argo-workflows --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Set the BASE_HREF environment variable on the argo-server container and configure the Ingress path to match. The fix PR corrected how the UI resolves asset paths under a subpath.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "Uncaught SyntaxError: Unexpected token '<'",
+        "- name: BASE_HREF\n   value: /argo/",
+        "rules:\n  - host: {{domain-name}}\n    http:\n      paths:\n      - backend:\n          serviceName: argo-server\n          servicePort: http\n        path: /argo(/|$)(.*)"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-workflows",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-workflows"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/issues/3080",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows/pull/3592"
+    },
+    "reactions": 53,
+    "comments": 37,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "argo"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:19:16.200Z",

+}
